scenes.text: In this lecture, we will explore Docker, a powerful platform for developing, shipping, and running applications through containerization. We will discuss the core concepts of Docker, including images, containers, Docker Hub, Dockerfile, and orchestration with Docker Compose. By the end of this session, you will understand how Docker can improve development workflows and application deployment.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker] --> B[Images]; A --> C[Containers]; A --> D[Dockerfile]; A --> E[Docker Hub]; A --> F[Docker Compose]; B -->|Builds from Dockerfile| D; C -->|Runs from Images| B; E -->|Pushes and Pulls Images| B; F -->|Orchestrates Multiple Containers| C;
